title: hieracium sparsum subsp. subsimplex
intro: Hieracium sparsum subsp. subsimplex is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, known for its yellow flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and inflammation, due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Hieracium sparsum subsp. subsimplex include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and even exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Hieracium sparsum subsp. subsimplex can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused in oil to utilize its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
